subject: Recording of T/L [DECEASED] at [LOCATION] - [DATE]
body_parts: I hope all is well. It was a privilege to have captured the funeral service.
The edited recording of the service can be viewed from the following link:

If you download the video onto your computer or a mobile device, it will become a permanent copy for you to keep. You can share it with anyone who was perhaps unable to attend the service on the day. This link will remain active for a couple of months; after that we keep a backup copy of all services should they be lost.
May I take this opportunity to wish you and the family well, and send you my highest hopes for the future.
